title: Electric Sheep Resource Pack
description: A resource pack for the loyal customers of the Electric Sheep on Valence SMP. Stores quilts, stuffed animals, needlepoint, and more.
body:
This is a resource pack developed for Valence SMP, a roleplay server. It contains textures and models for things bought from the owner's wool shop. These include stuffed animals, quilts, needlepoint art, and more.


NOTE: This is a CIT pack. Certain elements of this pack like the plushies will not display properly without either running Optifine in Forge, or CIT Resewn with fabric.
